_comment: Run config for run_llm.py. Roster: family-matched, all-open (2 families x 2 sizes) for a clean within-family H2/H3 size effect. Provider + quantization PINNED per model (verified 2026-07-01 via OpenRouter /endpoints): all fp8 so quantization is held constant across the size comparison (removes it as an H2 confound), allow_fallbacks=false. qwen-7b uses Together (only fp8 option; Phala rate-limited us). Prices are the real fp8 per-1M rates from /endpoints; authoritative per-call cost still comes from response usage.cost.
